name: Active Noise Cancelling Wireless Bluetooth Over-Ear Headphones Deep Sage - heyday™
description:
Experience immersive sound with the Active Noise Cancelling Wireless Bluetooth Over-Ear Headphones Deep Sage from heyday™. These headphones feature a built-in microphone and adjustable headband for personalized comfort. Delivers up to 40 hours of battery life with a quick 2.5-hour charge time for uninterrupted entertainment. These headphones offer versatile connectivity options with a 3.5mm jack and USB-C port. Designed with foam ear cushions to provide a snug fit, these headphones enhance your listening experience in an instant.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
